Hearing held. The Court took defendant Turner Construction Company's motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication under submission. Each side is to prepare and submit a proposed order for the Court's consideration. Defendant Turner Construction Company's request for a continuance was denied. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Apr-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party David Wright

RULING:
DEFENDANT KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.'s motion for summary adjudication of plaintiff's claim for punitive damages is denied. Defendant failed to sustain its burden of production of demonstrating that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that defendant acted with the requisite malice, fraud or oppression to warrant punitive damages. Plaintiff's responses to defendant's special interrogatories preclude defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Defendant's alternative motion for judgment on the pleadings is denied. Plaintiff's complaint ' his summary complaint which incorporates the Brayton Purcell Master Complaint ' put defendant on notice that plaintiff was asserting a claim for punitive damages and the complaint sufficiently pleads a claim for punitive damages. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)
